fields.label: Icon (class or emoji)
fields.description: Font Awesome (e.g. 'fa fa-cart-plus') or Octicon class, or an emoji. Ignored if an Icon Image is uploaded.

fields.label: Icon Image
fields.description: Optional. Upload a logo/image to use as the tile icon. Takes precedence over the icon class.

fields.label: Accent Colour
fields.description: Optional hex (e.g. #1F4E79). Defaults to the theme primary.

fields.label: Target Route
fields.description: Desk route the tile opens, e.g. '/app/sales-order/new', '/app/crm-mobile', or '/app/sales-order'.

fields.label: Open in New Tab
fields.description: When enabled, the tile opens the route in a new browser tab instead of navigating within the desk.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional sub-label shown under the tile title.

fields.label: Allowed Roles
fields.description: Leave empty to show the tile to everyone.
